title: Replace Navbar and Footer logo with newly uploaded logo

requirements.summary: Replace the logo image in Navbar and Footer with the newly uploaded logo from frontend/public/assets/generated/dmti-logo.png, displaying it at appropriate sizes while preserving aspect ratio
acceptanceCriteria: The Navbar displays the new logo image from frontend/public/assets/generated/dmti-logo.png
The Footer displays the new logo image from frontend/public/assets/generated/dmti-logo.png
The logo aspect ratio is preserved in both Navbar and Footer
No broken image links or placeholder images remain in Navbar or Footer

file_operations.description: Replace the existing logo image source with frontend/public/assets/generated/dmti-logo.dim_400x160.png (or dmti-logo.dim_256x256.png for smaller displays). Update the img element to use the new asset path, ensure the aspect ratio is preserved using appropriate width/height attributes or CSS, and verify the alt text describes the Digital Marketing Town logo appropriately.

Replace the existing logo image source with frontend/public/assets/generated/dmti-logo.dim_256x256.png. Update the img element to use the new asset path, ensure the aspect ratio is preserved using appropriate width/height attributes or CSS, and verify the alt text describes the Digital Marketing Town logo appropriately.
